content:
# Wehrlite

**Summary**: An ultramafic rock dominated by olivine and clinopyroxene, lacking orthopyroxene.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-iskandar|Iskandar, 2023]] identified rare wehrlites among the collected samples.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-iskandar|Iskandar, 2023]] Identifies specific mantle lithologies lacking certain minerals.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-iskandar|Iskandar, 2023]] determined via modal mineralogy and CIPW normative calculations.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Apart from two wehrlites, comparison alongside the norm calculated plots... shows that Harrat Uwayrid peridotite xenoliths of this study have broadly similar lithologies. ([[2023-iskandar|Iskandar, 2023, p. 63]])
